calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-03-2014 Off Calendar

Application For Judgment Pursuant To Prove Up
Off Calendar Mar-11-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: M. Goodman, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Saul Ferster, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, John E. Wai, Trustee of John E. Wai, 1981 Livingtrust, DBA United Property, Plaintiff John E. Wai is present in Court.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Edmund K. Yip dba KC Engineering Construction,
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-30 dismissed.
Plaintiff John E. Wai is worn and examinded on hiw own behalf.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

It is hereby ordered, adjudged, and decreed that Plaintiff John E. Wai, trustee of the John E. Wai, 1981 Living Trust, dba United Property Service recover from Defendant Edmund K. Yip dba KC Engineering Construction as follows:

Special Damages: $158,052.33
Pre-Judgment Interest: $50,239.31
Costs: $597.50
Total Judgment in the amount of $208,889.14
Judgment signed in open court. (see scanned judgment for details)
